user_task_description: This document contains three site images, but they are not laid out cleanly.
single_step_benchmark_instruction: Adjust the layout so the three images appear on one neat row with balanced spacing and alignment.
atomic_scope: Only layout control is explicitly requested in this task.
expected_output_type: A revised .docx document with a cleaner image layout.

notes.Why This Variant Is Hard:
- The content itself is simple, but the visual arrangement is awkward
- The images have uneven sizing and alignment
- A local layout fix can easily disturb surrounding structure if handled clumsily
